title: Weaver-facing git wrapper — closed subcommand/arg allowlist + controlled execution

execution.controlled_env: a copy of process.env with repository-redirecting variables stripped: GIT_DIR, GIT_WORK_TREE, GIT_COMMON_DIR, GIT_OBJECT_DIRECTORY, GIT_ALTERNATE_OBJECT_DIRECTORIES, GIT_INDEX_FILE, GIT_NAMESPACE
execution.path_args: must be canonical repository-relative POSIX (no absolute, no .., no backslash, no NUL)

why: The weaver's provenance must be faithful to the repository it names; an inherited GIT_DIR or a shell must not redirect or reinterpret the git calls.
non_claim: This is the WEAVER-facing wrapper only; the Task 2 clone/init fixture builder has its own separate test-only allowlist.
change_rule: Adding a subcommand/arg shape requires a plan amendment, TELOS re-authorization, and updated allowlist + option-override + metacharacter units.

oracle.test: clotho/scripts/test-util.mjs (allowlist, controlled-env two-repo GIT_DIR, option-override) + clotho/scripts/test-git.mjs (exact calls)
